top_signals.title: Oil Prices Fall After Trump Pauses Planned Iran Strike
top_signals.summary: Oil prices dropped in early Asian trade on Tuesday after President Trump said he had paused a planned military strike on Iran to allow negotiations to continue. At the time of writing, Brent front-month futures were trading at $109.70 per barrel, down 2.11%, while West Texas Intermediate front-month futures were changing hands at $102.80, down 1.55%. The decline comes after oil prices surged on Monday due to drone strikes on the UAE and Saudi Arabia after the Trump-Xi summit had failed to produce any breakthrough on reopening the Strait of Hormuz.…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin has shed $5,000 within days. ETF flows, derivatives say the selloff could worsen
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
